# Stochastic Modeling

**Summary**: Using probabilistic methods to account for uncertainty in geophysical data.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023]] used stochastic methods to model DCR and SR data to address uncertainties.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023]] Stochastic methods provide more realistic estimates of subsurface properties by accounting for data uncertainties.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023]] Application of stochastic algorithms to DCR and SR datasets.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The use of stochastic methods to model DCR and SR data can provide a useful tool for modeling the uncertainties in the data. ([[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023, p. 16]])
